prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12688名，2023年约12995名，2024年因四川首次新高考改革出现异常跳升至26240名，2025年回落至15239名。近三年（2023→2025）位次后移约 2244名，2025年基准位次约15239名；该校在四川理科/物理类招生计划：2022年11人、2023年11人、2024年20人、2025年44人（大幅扩招），2026年计划 33人，较2025年缩招约25%。缩招意味着竞争加剧，录取位次预计前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名主校区约第28名（2026年）， 盘锦校区共享985平台，层次定位明确；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常记录显示2024年曾出现投档线降至420分的传闻，但2025年已明显回升；化学工程与技术A+（对应能源化学工程专业）、力学A、土木工程A、工 商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A等，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 能源化学工程（化工类）属明显劝退方向，经济学类属分化观望，海洋技术热度 一般。四川省2026年高考总报名约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增加约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万人，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15239名、2026年缩招25%（位次前移约2286名）、四川考生规模增加约15.5%（竞争加剧进一步推高位次前移），以及学校声誉偏负面但985层次稳固等因素 ，预测2026年最低录取位次约12753名，区间12253–13253名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（含电子商务、经济学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 海洋技术
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12253–13253名内，建议以二档经济学类为主攻方向、一档能源化学工程为冲刺目标、三档海洋技术为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如12253名以内）可重 点冲刺能源化学工程王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 12688, in 2023 approximately 12995, in 2024 due to Sichuan's first new college entrance examination reform, there was an abnormal jump to 26240, and in 2025 it fell back to 15239. Over the past three years (2023→2025), the ranking has shifted backward by about 2244 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 15239. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science/physics categories: 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 44 in 2025 (significant expansion), and 33 planned for 2026, a reduction of about 25% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment implies intensified competition, and the admission ranking is expected to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; the main campus ranks approximately 28th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026). The Panjin Campus shares the 985 platform, with a clear level positioning. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission cutoffs or abnormal application scores. Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at a medium-to-high level. Historical abnormal admission records show rumors of the cutoff dropping to 420 points in 2024, but it has significantly recovered in 2025. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (corresponding to the Energy Chemical Engineering major), Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc., highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Energy Chemical Engineering (chemical category) is a clearly discouraged direction, Economics category is in a state of differentiation and observation, and Marine Technology has average popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrations in Sichuan is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from approximately 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 329,000, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 15239, a 25% enrollment reduction in 2026 (ranking moving forward by about 2286 places), an approximately 15.5% increase in the number of Sichuan candidates (further pushing the ranking forward due to intensified competition), and factors such as a somewhat negative school reputation but a solid 985 level, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 12753, with a range of 12253–13253.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marine Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12253–13253, it is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 Economics Category as the main direction, aim for the Tier 1 Energy Chemical Engineering as a stretch goal, and use the Tier 3 Marine Technology as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12253), you can focus on aiming for the flagship Energy Chemical Engineering major.
